name: Andy Ogles
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $74,629 for Andy Ogles in U.S. House, TN-05. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
